title: Emergency Exception Ends Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action is initially authorized under an emergency exception, but the emergency condition resolves before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized under an emergency exception due to immediate clinical necessity.
state_transition: The emergency condition resolves and ordinary consent requirements apply before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated at the moment ordinary consent requirements return.
constitutional_evaluation: Emergency exception status cannot be inherited after the exception condition no longer exists.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the emergency exception no longer supplies a valid consent basis.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when emergency consent exception continuity ends before execution.
clinical_action: Execute non-emergent action under expired emergency exception
